{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321225201D69BAC3BBD96BE641FF7"}"},"total":369},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7271144798454858554","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看得很欢乐呀，前期一顿乱磕，后期确定了也磕的很快乐，怪物猫猫找主人什么的。但是感觉每个世界没看够啊呜呜呜，作者大大也很可爱，吃我一发亲亲(ʃƪ ˘ ³˘)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692945500,"group_id":"7213130518592752675","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxtNXl75wZBm6JEEuXMUHC3BeqLqoobB3cbp4JMuChFG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a309693cdd554422bbbfde2002d068de~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614536&x-signature=dDOyaH0Y9Mz%2BumqJgoztOi0Rnn8%3D","user_id":"2181857472683224","user_name":"笠笙。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2181857472683224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7213130518592752675","book_info":{"abstract":"一场狗血的车祸穿越，让我绑定了综漫系统，于是。
猎人
伊尔迷：我们家小离很弱的，不可以欺负他哦，西索。
西索：嗯哼~弱？是指把黑帮全变成自己手下吗~♥
奇犽：我三哥？哈？我一根手指就能杀死他啊。
库洛洛：...请，教教我怎么办到的。
离（壳子太宰乱步）：我真的很弱哦~

咒回世界
真人：小离酱~来和我玩吧！
五条悟（兰花指）：你们这群偷腥猫！

柯学世界
某小学生：离哥哥，是个很厉害的侦探，总有一天我会超越他！
某gin（点烟）：是个麻烦的家伙。

本文篇群像，是双男主，主受文，感情戏不多吧，排雷：作者是个萌新，文笔不好
